verdict.summary: The change closes the unbounded missed-fix path fail-closed: when the sole durable budget marker cannot be recorded, it attempts the existing human-stop transition immediately, retains the counted lane error, and keeps retrying if both mutations fail. The new self-tests are non-vacuous and cover successful escalation, failure of both target mutations, and the normal successful-marker path without spurious escalation. No trust check is weakened and no hostile reviewer-directed instruction appears in the diff.
